command: Add-Type -AssemblyName PresentationCore; $player = New-Object System.Windows.Media.MediaPlayer; $files = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\Media' -Filter *.wav -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Write-Output "Found files:"; $files | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; if ($files.Count -gt 0) { $file = $files[0].FullName; $player.Open([Uri]$file); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $player.Play(); Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $player.Stop(); Write-Output "Played: $file" } else { Write-Output 'No WAV files found in Windows Media folder' }
description: تشغيل ملف صوتي من أصوات Windows المدمجة لاختبار سماعة بلوتوث
